character_face_visibility.佐藤美咲: face visible; three-quarter; breath uneven touching screen

shot_spine.first_frame_goal: 山田弱声承认去酒店起身离开背影佝偻，石川起身窗边注视宣布排除山田拿出文件夹，美咲触屏呼吸乱看小说家族章节

character_face_visibility.佐藤美咲: face visible; three-quarter; gripping bag glancing back
character_face_visibility.石川悠一: face visible; front; watchful from window

shot_spine.first_frame_goal: 健一走在渐暗街道摸领带，美咲前方紧握手袋瞥身后石川窗后注视，匿名文本连结彩花过去小樱处境回响
shot_spine.split_notes: final reaction emphasizes hook connection and departure tension

qa_notes: All must_include facts covered in 13 shots
Phone call split into dial, listen, implicit hang via continuity
SH13 lands on hook linking past via novel details
Fixed costumes: Misaki in old coat throughout
No invented beats, props use IDs
